I do two things really well and my experience draws from being both a consultant and operating executive:

(1) I help growing companies--especially SaaS players--retain more customer and more revenue at better margins. 
(2) help marketplace-based businesses balance supply, demand, and the overall user experience.  

I'm also an angel and seed investor in both of these spaces and very aware the current players and market dynamics in B2B SaaS and online marketplaces.

Looking for insights to inform a SaaS and/or marketplace investment? Wondering if you already identified the low-hanging fruit to unlock near-term and durable value? Need a pair of hands to shadow or temporarily add to your leadership team? 

I welcome the opportunity to have these conversations and talk about tangible results. 

Less

Achieved strongest retention numbers in 10 year history and improved CSAT. conducted primary research, facilitated executive leadership sessions, sessions and produced recommendations for a global client success function and sentiment tracking strategy (NPS). reframed the sales and success functions toward outcome-based metrics and incentivized both customers and team members for achieving higher early usage benchmarks. The executives defined high-probability + high-impact initiatives to increase their value in the market and meet the emerging needs of customers and consumers.
